title: centaurea fabrei
intro: Centaurea fabrei, also known as Fabre's cornflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to France. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea fabrei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues.
